buckets.title: Generated Files
buckets.intent: Review regenerated Dart, Drift, Freezed, bridge, and lock files apart from human-authored source.
buckets.recommendedAction: Regenerate from source, verify generator commands, then stage only outputs that correspond to reviewed model/API changes.

buckets.title: Binary And Evidence Artifacts
buckets.intent: Review DLLs, APKs, screenshots, databases, and other binary artifacts outside normal source diffs.
buckets.recommendedAction: Keep release payload binaries and smoke evidence in a deliberate artifact review; exclude scratch screenshots and research blobs from the release PR.

buckets.title: Release Infrastructure And Evidence
buckets.intent: Keep release gates, production audit tools, public readiness docs, and operational docs together.
buckets.recommendedAction: Stage audit tooling and evidence docs as the release-readiness PR only after confirming each artifact is current and reproducible.

buckets.title: Headless Remote API And Dashboard
buckets.intent: Review headless server routes, auth policy, dashboard assets, LAN behavior, and WebSocket changes as one API surface.
buckets.recommendedAction: Pair this bucket with route contract tests, dashboard smoke logs, auth/LAN evidence, and reconnect evidence.

buckets.title: Mobile Remote Client
buckets.intent: Review Android/mobile remote-client code and mobile smoke tooling separately from desktop/headless server changes.
buckets.recommendedAction: Stage with Android build metadata and emulator smoke artifacts only after confirming the server API bucket it depends on is reviewed.

buckets.title: Native Driver And Bridge Source
buckets.intent: Review Rust native code, driver integrations, Flutter Rust Bridge source, and bridge package API changes together.
buckets.recommendedAction: Keep source changes apart from compiled DLLs; require platform build evidence and driver capability notes before release staging.

buckets.title: Core Data Model And Services
buckets.intent: Review database, model, provider, backend, migration, and shared service changes as a data/API compatibility set.
buckets.recommendedAction: Stage with focused tests and a real older-profile migration artifact; generated DB/model files stay in the generated-files bucket.

buckets.title: Desktop UI And Workflow Packages
buckets.intent: Review app UI, shared UI system, planetarium, plugin, updater, WebRTC, and desktop workflow changes together or split by screen if too large.
buckets.recommendedAction: Use UI consistency audit results and focused screenshot/smoke evidence before moving these paths into a release PR.

buckets.title: Tests And Support Tooling
buckets.intent: Review non-release test files, scripts, package config, and developer tooling separately from product behavior.
buckets.recommendedAction: Stage only support changes needed to verify the release; defer unrelated audit scratch or developer-only helpers.

buckets.title: Out Of Release Scope Review
buckets.intent: Quarantine scratch reports, research files, goal tracking, and broad miscellaneous edits until they are explicitly accepted or excluded.
buckets.recommendedAction: Do not stage into the public release branch without owner review and an explicit reason.

releaseLists.title: Must Ship
releaseLists.description: Release-critical source, docs, and tooling paths that are not generated outputs or binary/evidence artifacts.

releaseLists.title: Generated Only
releaseLists.description: Generated files that should be reviewed against their source changes and generator commands.

releaseLists.title: Binary And Evidence
releaseLists.description: Binary payloads, screenshots, APKs, DLLs, and other evidence artifacts that need explicit artifact review.

releaseLists.title: Defer Or Exclude
releaseLists.description: Non-release-critical paths that need owner review before they are staged into a public release branch.
